lines.speaker: Mag
lines.text: Welcome to Elder Raley's Herblore Stall. Would you like to buy some herblore supplies?

lines.speaker: Mag
lines.text: No. Elder Raley's teaching me to become a herbalist myself, but he's always quite busy, so I normally look after the stall for him.

lines.speaker: Mag
lines.text: So, would you like to buy some herblore supplies?

lines.speaker: Mag
lines.text: Okay, well, you know where to find me if you change your mind.
